Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.stats

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.rest.server.stats
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.logger
REST Logging API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.ops
Ops / introspection mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that ship the operational surface (request echo, JVM admin, route index) every long-running Juneau service eventually grows.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.stats
Method exec stats utilities
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.stats used by org.apache.juneau.rest.server
    Class
    Description
    MethodExecStats
    Method execution statistics.
    MethodExecStore
    Method execution statistics database.
    MethodInvoker
    A wrapper around a Method.invoke(Object, Object...) method that allows for basic instrumentation.
    RestContextStats
    A snapshot of execution statistics for REST resource classes.
    ThrownStore
    An in-memory cache of thrown exceptions.
